task.inventory_reason: The cluster is a local raw corpus candidate with model CSVs and analysis scripts from an ecology/evolution in-silico replication package. It appears reusable, but the compact evidence does not prove a direct independent original-replication pair table; it needs file-level inventory before any Figure 1 promotion.
